feed.title: Scholar Alerts — Clean Feed
feed.subtitle: Google Scholar alerts reformatted as individual article entries

entry.title: The Science of the New
entry.content:
Authors: V Loreto, VDP Servedio, F Tria

Journal: 2026

Abstract: This book offers a unified quantitative framework for understanding the dynamics of novelty and innovation across biological, technological, and societal systems. It explores how first-time occurrences—ranging from everyday experiences to ...

Alert: Vito DP Servedio (author alert)
